title: DB connection pool exhaustion
expected_root_cause: Database connection pool exhaustion under load
expected_fix: Increase pool_size from 10 to 50 or roll back the recent deployment

title: Service OOM from memory leak
expected_root_cause: Memory leak in request handler — unbounded cache growth
expected_fix: Cap cache size and restart the service; investigate retained references

title: Upstream timeout cascade
expected_root_cause: Upstream timeout cascading from inventory-svc slowdown
expected_fix: Add circuit breaker and reduce upstream timeout to fail fast

title: Bad config rolled out
expected_root_cause: Misconfiguration deployed — invalid feature flag value
expected_fix: Revert config change and add schema validation in CI

title: Third-party dependency failure
expected_root_cause: Third-party dependency (Stripe) outage
expected_fix: Wait for upstream recovery; enable degraded-mode fallback
